g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Modbus function code does an RTU master use to write a coil?')
sendPrompt('What Modbus function code does a TCP client use to write a coil?')
sendPrompt('How does the ModbusRTU library store coil values internally?')
sendPrompt('How does ArduinoModbus store coil values internally?')
sendPrompt('How does syncFromRTU detect a change?')
sendPrompt('How does syncFromTCP detect a change?')
sendPrompt('What is the shared memory in the Modbus bridge?')
sendPrompt('How does applyHardware use the shared variable?')
